g.text: traceability absorption are provided by the SignatureBasedMergerBase base class
SQLite ORDER BY provides rule row order:
DestinationAddress / Service / Application / SourceAddress / Action / rowid.
Domain runners consume this order and do not sort the full rule stream.
union OriginalPolicyNames and update MinimumIndex / MaximumIndex
sort mutable policies by MinimumIndex / MaximumIndex
